title: centaurea kestanica
intro: Centaurea kestanica, also known as the Iranian knapweed or Kestane knapweed, is a plant species within the daisy family (Asteraceae). It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating gastrointestinal issues, fever, and respiratory problems. The plant is rich in flavonoids and phenolic acids, which contribute to its health benefits, such as reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health. Centaurea kestanica can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or dried extracts for medicinal use, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects.
